metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.18-beta.22
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Prefers square and near-square images during automatic Artwork discovery. - Makes all six left-navigation groups independently collapsible and persistent. - Leaves missing Artwork cells empty while retaining the inspector empty state. - Reads bounded image headers and caches dimensions for large-library performance.
